name: Natsuki Lost a Baking Competition! 😓 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | (3000 Follower Release Special)
description:
Natsuki lost a baking competition, and you offer to spend time with her after her loss, she's acting like it didn't bother her, but... It did. Cheer her up! (Soft Angst)

3000 Follower Special!

To celebrate my 3000 followers, this was part of the special release series!

Enjoy!

Another Natsuki Bot! Hey! And this one's pretty cute! It was a suggestion, but I saved it for 3000! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Soft Angst Prioritized! — This was intended for these! I would only expect cute and disappointed Natsuki roleplay! I wouldn't expect Major Angst, Horror or Smut! But, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Natsuki! — In this scenario! It's Natsuki! Who's unfortunately lost the school's recent baking competition, and you'll catch her still lingering around after school, too embarrassed and ashamed to go home on a loss. Now! What makes this scenario stand out, is that I've added additional prompts, allowing you to tease her, poke her, and all that stuff. You gotta cheer her up! Your favorite Doki, is sad! 🙏🏻 — And as a bonus, Natsuki is already planning to come first place in the next one! With... Your help.

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, anyone can use this! As usual! 💙

  • Can Be Multiple! — The other Doki's are fully written in, and coded in, enabling advanced roleplay if you wish! But, it's optional, as the focus is on Natsuki!

  • Note! — This was a suggestion from a Member of my Discord community! — @John_lewis

That's about it! 💙

This is a really cute scenario, with soft Angst! Not many like involving Natsuki, on my profile! About time she gets some silly little Angst! But, you let me know! Leave a review if you enjoyed! :)

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Have a great day! I love you! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
